patch.value: CI: split quality+smoke gates into a parallel job, share dist via artifact

Currently ubuntu/node20 runs build -> test -> coverage -> static-quality -> compatibility-check -> packaging-smoke -> npx-smoke -> plugin-smoke serially. Extract a build-once job that uploads dist + node_modules cache, then run build-test matrix in parallel with a 'gates' job that downloads dist and runs static/compat/packaging/smoke independently. Cuts ubuntu/20 critical path from ~12min to ~8min.
build job uploads dist artifact; gates job downloads artifact and runs in parallel with matrix; ubuntu/20 critical path drops measurably; all gates still execute.
